transcript: I g... I'm gonna cruise down, but I gotta hop on the toilet first, partner.
[mocking] "Bud"? You need to shut the fuck up and quit callin' up here, 'cause I'm really startin' to get pissed off at you.
What are you talkin' about, man?
[mocking] "Err, you're going to hop on the toilet"? Yeah, c'mon, hop on the toilet, and come down here and I'll beat the fuckin' shit out of you.
